headline: Humana (HUM) Valuation Check After Launch Of New CenterWell Pharmacy Distribution Center
summary: Humana (HUM) is drawing fresh attention after opening full operations at its new US$83 million CenterWell Pharmacy mail order distribution center in Orlando, Florida, expanding prescription delivery capacity across the region. See our latest analysis for Humana. The stock's recent momentum has been strong, with a 30 day share price return of 42.12% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 54.14%, even though the 3 and 5 year total shareholder returns remain in decline. Some investors may link...
